zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancaster於大約1080年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特 卡素時，他的父親Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendal27歲，母親Christiana De Taillebois26歲。他於大約1104年與Godith Fritzreinsfrid在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancaster于大约1080年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特 卡素时，他的父亲Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendal27岁，母亲Christiana De Taillebois26岁。他于大约1104年与Godith Fritzreinsfrid在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1170年在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德肯達爾享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancaster was born about 1080, in Lancaster Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendal, was 27 and his mother, Christiana De Taillebois, was 26. He married Godith Fritzreinsfrid about 1104, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1170, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancaster est né environ 1080, à Lancaster Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendal, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Christiana De Taillebois, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Godith Fritzreinsfrid environ 1104, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1170, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

Er hat um 1104 in Westmorland, England Godith Fritzreinsfrid geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1170 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Kendal, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancasterが約1080年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスター カストルで生まれた時，父Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendalは27歳，母Christiana De Tailleboisは26歳であった。約1104年にイギリスウエストモーランドでGodith Fritzreinsfridと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancaster(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendal(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana De Taillebois(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1104년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Godith Fritzreinsfrid(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Godith Fritzreinsfrid aproximadamente 1104, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert Fitzketel De Lancaster родился около 1080 г. в местности ланкастир кастл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ketel Fitzeldred De Kendal было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana De Taillebois, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Godith Fritzreinsfrid около 1104 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1170 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.
